scripts.install:local: mkdir -p src-tauri/target && touch src-tauri/target/.metadata_never_index && node node_modules/@tauri-apps/cli/tauri.js build --bundles app && (pkill -9 -f 'TokenBar.app/Contents/MacOS/tokenbar' || true) && (killall -9 tokenbar 2>/dev/null || true) && rm -rf /Applications/TokenBar.app && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/TokenBar.app /Applications/TokenBar.app && (xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/TokenBar.app 2>/dev/null || true) && rm -rf src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/TokenBar.app src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Tokcat.app && open -n /Applications/TokenBar.app
